objective: Complete the F-0037 application-amplification foundation by rejecting resource uploads larger than 50 MiB before application-owned full-buffer duplication, content-addressed file persistence, upload-operation creation, parsing, catalog mutation, or success audit; use Content-Length only as an early fast-fail hint and authoritative File.size as the fail-closed post-multipart boundary, preserve exact-limit success, return a stable business error, add a matching content-admin client gate, and leave F-0037 open_partitioned for ingress streaming and concurrency residuals without changing format conversion, schema, authorization, dependencies, or other findings.
blockedFiles: dependency, custom multipart package, schema/migration, real database/data, permission expansion, Provider, external service, secret/env, deployment, PR, force-push, non-canonical remote, Subagent, kernel/guard/smoke
DOCX/PPTX/PDF conversion, conversion queue/retry/delete lifecycle, total storage quota, public download, paper_asset/content_image upload, or other finding

authoritativeChainEvidence.requirements: RAG module 6.3 and US-05-03 require a 50 MiB single-resource limit and a stable too-large error.
authoritativeChainEvidence.caller: AdminResourceKnowledgeManagement currently advertises the limit but submits any selected File.
authoritativeChainEvidence.route: The resources route delegates directly to the runtime collection POST without an ingress size gate.
authoritativeChainEvidence.service: uploadLocalResource calls request.formData and then prepareLocalResourceFile before any size decision.
authoritativeChainEvidence.storage: prepareLocalResourceFile calls file.arrayBuffer and computes the content identity; storePreparedLocalResourceFile then persists it.
authoritativeChainEvidence.parser: parseLocalTextDocumentAsset checks size only after persistence and classifies oversized content as conversion_failed success.
authoritativeChainEvidence.rootCause: The 50 MiB invariant is owned by the downstream parser rather than the upload command and storage-preparation boundary.

testOnlyExpansion.reason: Guardian-mandated affected regressions for the unchanged upload saga/idempotency and F-0090 private download paths.

residuals: missing or understated Content-Length can allow an oversized multipart body to reach framework formData parsing without a trusted streaming cap
concurrent individually valid uploads have no process or platform aggregate inbound memory and traffic budget
full closure requires a separately approved trusted deployment body cap, streaming upload protocol, or maintained streaming multipart parser
invalidatedBy: dependency, deployment, upload protocol, file envelope, base, remote, or risk drift
oversized upload reaches arrayBuffer, file stream, persistence, repository, parser, catalog, or success audit
multipart overhead fast-fail rejects an exact-limit file

resumeAnchor.task: Close only the application-amplification foundation, preserve F-0037 open_partitioned with ingress streaming and concurrency residuals, then continue the P1 queue.
resumeAnchor.condition: no dependency, schema, real database, permission, Provider, mechanism, conversion lifecycle, or other finding expansion
